title: Q3 Budget Review
body: Reviewed Q3 departmental budgets. Marketing requested 15% increase for digital campaign. Engineering is within forecast. Decisions deferred until next meeting.

title: Weekly Standup Notes
body: Peter: Working on web portal update. Mary Jane: Drafting newsletter content. Harry: Finalising sponsorship agreements. No blockers.

title: Product Launch Planning Meeting
body: Meeting to finalize product launch details. Launch date: 2027-09-01. Action items: 1. Finalize press release by marketing (owner: Alice Johnson). 2. Complete QA testing by engineering (owner: Bob Chen). 3. Coordinate partner announcements (owner: Carol Davis). Notes: All teams must be ready by Aug 15 for final review. Testing must include load and security scenarios.

title: Confidential HR Restructuring Plan
body: Confidential: HR restructuring will affect Engineering and Marketing departments. We plan to reduce headcount by 10% and reassign team leads. Detailed org chart changes will be announced next week. Do not share externally.

title: Office Supply Inventory Check
body: Checked stock: printer paper low, ordering 50 reams. Coffee beans sufficient. All desks have functioning monitors. No further action needed.
